LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE OCT-08-2024 HEARING RE: PETITIONER PHILLIP EDGINTON'S MOTION TO HEAR THE PETITION FOR ORDER OF AFFIRMATION IN APPLICATION FOR ITALIAN DUAL CITIZENSHIP, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER'S UNOPPOSED "PETITION FOR ORDER IN AFFIRMATION IN APPLICATION FOR DUAL ITALIAN CITIZENSHIP" IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Hear The Petition For Order Of Affirmation In Application For Italian Dual Citizenship; Declaration Of Phillip Mark Edginton In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Oct-08-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. LARSEN ENSBERG, Esq. of Ensberg Law Group, APLC (tel: 626-813-3744) for Petitioner.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER PHILLIP EDGINTON's Motion To Hear The Petition For Order Of Affirmation In Application For Italian Dual Citizenship.

Matter not argued/contested. The court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner's unopposed "petition for order in affirmation in application for dual Italian citizenship" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
